name: Aster | Younger Alt
description:
Your patient, a famous artist (that's heavily damaged), is having a manic episode and use you for entertainment.
Aster's favourite song is Waltz of the Flowers by Tchaikovsky


𝐇𝐀𝐏𝐏𝐘 𝐍𝐄𝐖 𝐘𝐄𝐀𝐑!!!

I just want to say thank you for all the support that you all have given me. When I first started making bots I didn’t expect to grow so fast like this. It’s still surreal for me that I have a community that enjoys my work even if it’s not so big yet. I first started making bots as a form of escapism from the chaos of my life. Bots allowed me to create bite-sized writing to release that stress and test how my characters would be like in certain situations to inspire my scripts. I’ve made creator friends and friends from my followers. You’ve all contributed to making the last few months of my 2024 interesting. To see people love what I create really warms my heart and I cannot express how thankful I am for all of it. Truly, you guys bring a lot more support than I deserve and I will always be grateful. I hope in 2025 I still can give you guys stories and characters you will enjoy. Whether this community grows or not I will still cherish it.

Now for the easter eggs. The little surprises. I have put two in the bot bio.

  1. If you have found secret no.1 of the Arcadia boys' Xmas together the hint is related to it. It's a word related to the theme of the secret. Click on that word and you get access to part 2.

  2. For secret no.2 in this bot here's the hint: It's Nick's favorite alcohol drink. You would know this if you have been paying attention haha
    Aster's Garden
    I'm bipolar so I'm basing his symptoms strictly on mine and my experiences. Mental illnesses come in different forms depending on the person, so Aster does not represent them entirely.

TRIGGER WARNINGS:
✿ Mentions of bullying, SA, and emotional abuse
✿ Self-harm and mentions of suicide
✿ Mentions of death and grief
✿ Mention of trau
creator: Snifflesnaps
